Employee Life Insurance Coverage: $10,000 increments to a maximum of $500,000. See Cost Illustration page for details.
Child(ren) Life Insurance Coverage: Your dependent children age 14 days to 26 years. You may elect one of the following benefit options: $10,000.
Accidental Death & Dismemberment: Employee, Spouse & Child(ren) coverage. Maximum 1 times life amount.
Age Reduction Schedule: 35% at age 65, 60% at age 70, 75% at age 75, 85% at age 80
